description: This pipeline processes images by first importing them, then extracting and annotating their metadata, followed by filtering and merging the annotated data, and finally outputting the processed images with added annotations that contain image properties, while also modifying and combining existing annotations to generate new values.

577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.name: annotation-merge
577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
